overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on an industrial rooftop with views of futuristic skyscrapers, proceeding along a waterfront promenade overlooking a beach with palm trees and a roller coaster, then descending into neon-lit urban streets beneath elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rooftop with debris and burning barrel

events.description: passing the burning barrel and continuing forward across the rooftop
approaching the edge of the rooftop with expansive city skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the concrete rooftop past industrial materials and a burning barrel

entered.detail: metal barrel with active fire emitting orange flames and smoke
large stack of wooden shipping pallets wrapped in plastic
tall glass and steel towers with holographic advertisements floating above
massive concrete overpass with support pillars extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial rooftop with a burning barrel and stacked pallets. The camera moves forward across the concrete surface toward the edge of the building, with futuristic skyscrapers and an elevated highway visible in the distance against a clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking beach and ocean

events.description: reaching the metal railing at the rooftop edge, ocean and beach come into view
turning left to follow the waterfront path while overlooking the beach below

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade railing overlooking the beach and ocean

entered.detail: calm blue ocean extending to the horizon with distant landmasses visible
tall palm trees with green fronds lining the edge of the beach below
sandy beach area between the promenade and the ocean water
safety railing along the edge of the elevated promenade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront overlook as the camera reaches the railing. The ocean and beach come into view below, with palm trees lining the shore. The futuristic city skyline shifts to the right as the camera turns left along the promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal amusement area with roller coaster and beach huts

events.description: roller coaster structure comes into full view along the shoreline
turning inland away from the beach toward the urban streets and overpasses

agents.ego_description: panning along the beach view to observe the roller coaster and shoreline, then turning back toward the city

entered.detail: large steel roller coaster structure extending over the water with multiple hills
small wooden structures and shacks on the sandy beach area
illuminated holographic advertisements and neon signage on buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans along the coastal view revealing a large roller coaster structure over the water and beach huts on the sand. Palm trees line the foreground while neon signs become visible on the right. The segment ends with a turn back toward the dense urban core.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass
passing parked vehicles along the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street beneath the overpass, surrounded by towering futuristic architecture and neon signs

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows over the street below
thick support columns holding up the elevated highway
large illuminated advertising screens with vivid pink and blue holographic displays
futuristic cars parked along the side of the asphalt road
paved street surface with lane markings running under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the urban street level beneath the elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the camera passes concrete support pillars and parked vehicles. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene while futuristic skyscrapers tower overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stark industrial rooftop into a vibrant coastal promenade before descending into a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a concrete roof beside a burning barrel and stacked pallets, moving forward toward the edge where futuristic skyscrapers and an elevated highway stand against a clear morning sky. As the camera reaches the railing, the view opens up to a waterfront overlook where the city skyline shifts to the right to reveal a beach lined with palm trees. The scene then pans along the coast, passing beach huts and a massive roller coaster structure over the water, before turning away from the shore toward the dense urban core. Finally, the camera moves beneath the shadow of an elevated highway overpass, passing concrete pillars and parked vehicles as holographic advertisements and neon billboards illuminate the street level.
